records.ety: [L. assuefacere to accustom to; assuetus (p. p. of assuescere to accustom to) + facere to make; cf. OF. assuefaction.]

defs: The act of accustoming, or the state of being accustomed; habituation.
quotes: Custom and studies efform the soul like wax, and by assuefaction introduce a nature.
